HOME.INTRODUCTION:
Genius Baller was born 2017 founded by coach and player of Basketball.
 With his ambition and passion of coaching and playing basketball and his love of children.
 He started Genius Baller to offer Basket ball skills to children, entertaining,confidence
 Self esteem, improve their fitness level,team work encouragement,development of their social skills
 and general health improvement.At Genius Baller we provide an opportunity for the kids to practice
 and improve foreign language where the language of teaching and instruction is English.
We help kids with an ambition to become profession  basketball player to achieve their dreams
 with the Love of basketball. 
  We have resources to provide recreational benefits which other sports programs are unable to match.
HOME.PROGRAM_INTRODUCTION: Genius Baller Offer The Following Basketball Programs:

ABOUT.COACH_INTRODUCTION:
Effective Genius Baller’s basketball coach with 7 years of experience, skilled in communication and goal-setting.
 Seeking to raise a youth basketball spirit, better practice drill plans, and improved use of man-to-man and zone plays.
 Ensured individual team members set and hit personal goals for athletics and academics with 90 % success rate.
         he has been coaching children and youths with different levels of basketball skills for more than 7 years at univeristy of kentucky(USA),
 INTERNATIONAL CLUB(Beijing ,china), YOUCAN Youth,NIKE BASKETBALL SUMMER CAMP at(Hunan,Changsha,Shenzhen,Yunnan,Shandong,Hangzhou),
 CHENGSI-CULTURE(Shanghai), SHANGHAI BLACK WIND company,YK PAO SCHOOL,菊园小学, 一中心小学， 育才初级中学 and LIQIUPING company(Shanghai)

BEGINNER.TITLE: Beginner Basketball@Genius Baller
BEGINNER.BEGINNER_INTRODUCTION:
New to basketball or you have started playing and wish to be better?
 Beginner’s basketball is a perfect introductory program to game of basketball in a safe environment. 
 Participants will learn all the fundamentals of basketball in a small group.
 Young basketball enthusiast will develop dribbling techniques and become an all-round skills basketball player.
  They will build on fundamentals and fitness over a course of time. 
 Basketball training is open to students with special needs.

PRIVATE.PRIVATE_PARAGRAPH: Genius Baller private basketball skills coaching and basketball training for individuals is ideal for serious athletes that want to identify and hone in on specific areas which need improvement.
PRIVATE.PRIVATE_SUB_PARAGRAPH: 1 – 1 training is a personalized and dedicated time to work on closing skills-gap or working intensively to develop a specific skill set whether it be :
PRIVATE.PRIVATE_FOCUS: Private basketball coaching lessons will be a focus on
PRIVATE.PRIVATE_FOCUS_SUB: post or perimeter scoring moves, and defensive principles.
PRIVATE.BENEFITS: Personal basketball coaching can also help boost overall hoops IQ, confidence, and aggressiveness. Small group sessions expand to team-concepts.
PRIVATE.PLAYER:
Become a complete player and tell the coach what you need to work on. 
 The individual can also learn how to do a proper layup. Some parents want block sessions similar to a crash course just to make the school team.
PRIVATE.SESSION: Each session is 1hour and 15mins, for Kids and Adults, register now:

TRAINING.INTRODUCTION:
A 10-week term class for those aged between 5 to 19 years old.
  The duration for each class is 1.5 hours. Training includes individual instruction and repetitions,
 and small group drills – game situations,
 half court drills, and game scrimmage with running clock and score to simulate a high paced actual game environment.
 The depth of the instruction increases gradually in appropriate increments based on age and ability.

SUMMER.TITLE: Genius Baller
SUMMER.INTRODUCTION:
If your child has an interest in basketball or wants to learn, this camp is the ultimate experience.
  An intensive week of training and workshops, the camp will help your child to excel on the court – learning the fundamentals,
 developing their skills and achieving a thorough understanding of the rules and theory.
 Genius Baller Basketball camps also help to develop essential life skills including teamwork, sharing,
 self-confidence, competitiveness and celebrating own and others’ achievements.
